creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
0.2.0	2010-05-08/04:00
		-Add EESDP compatibility.

Fix: --- Makefile.orig	2010-05-14 03:34:38.000000000 -0500
+++ Makefile	2010-05-14 03:35:40.000000000 -0500
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	Net-LDAP-AutoDNs
-PORTVERSION=	0.1.0
+PORTVERSION=	0.2.0
 CATEGORIES=	net perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	../../authors/id/V/VV/VVELOX
@@ -15,8 +15,6 @@
 MAINTAINER=	vvelox@vvelox.net
 COMMENT=	Automatically make some default decisions some LDAP DNs and scopes
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	${SITE_PERL}/mach/BSD/Sysctl.pm:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/p5-BSD-Sysctl
-
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
 MAN3=		Net::LDAP::AutoDNs.3
--- p5-Net-LDAP-AutoDNs_Makefile.diff ends here ---
